title: CompressionReport — zipper artifact (Z-series)
description: Compression's object is BEHAVIOR, not text. Six-vendor-intersection JSON. Verdict is LEXICOGRAPHIC (R11): gate 1 = behavioral equivalence (regression not-down AND probes not-down); only then gate 2 compares token gain vs exception cost. Literal-lossless-but-behavior-degraded is a negative asset. Anchors: Z1 three ledgers + lexicographic verdict, Z2 dual acceptance, Z5 incompressible list, Z6 cache prefix, Z7 description polish.

skipped.description: Z is the one optional stage; a declared skip does not block final_verdict=done. When true the other fields may be empty.

per_path_token_delta.description: Z2: per typical-trigger-path before/after actual read-token. Paths come from spec.trigger_tests positives, NOT zipper's own choosing.

behavioral_equivalence_gate.description: Z1 gate 1 (the VETO): behavior degraded => roll back regardless of token gain.

three_ledgers.description: Z1: three incommensurable ledgers. token_gain & exception_cost share token/period units; omission_loss is probe-quality x failure-cost weight.

token_gain.description: net token/period saved on typical paths

omission_loss.description: measured by E7 probes, NOT 'I looked and nothing dropped'

exception_cost.description: frequency x cost of newly-created exception paths

probe_scores.description: E7: only APPLICABLE probes. For static skill-text compression only Recall & Decision map; do NOT fill Artifact/Continuation to satisfy the schema (that is the schema-valid!=true shadow).

score.description: blind-judge rubric score, or 'n/a' when not applicable

incompressible_check.description: Z5: reasoning traces, file/artifact-state info, and INVARIANT rules + their examples are NEVER compressed. Governance constraints need structural Constraint Pinning, not 'tell the summarizer to keep them'.

cache_prefix_check.description: Z6: head zero-dynamic (no date/version/random id in the prefix), static-first load order.

importance_ranking.description: Z3: the explicit importance ordering; rare-but-fatal Gotchas promoted to INVARIANT, not squeezed out by length. Moved-out content each carries a move-out reason.

lexicographic_verdict.description: Z1: pass only if gate 1 passed AND net token gain > exception cost
